raw_consumer_statement: I disputed transaction of XXXX for an item what was not included in any of my received packages. XXXX was made on XX/XX/year> with XXXX Rack. The merchant told me that the shipment was handed to the resident. I am the only resident at my property and never received that item. I filed a dispute with American Express, which was denied. I disagreed with Amex denial and it was reopened and the denied again. Last after multiple complaints to different representatives and supervisors I spoke to representative superior on XX/XX/XXXX, who said it will be resolved for me as American Express allegedly has protection program for unresolved purchases. I realized that the refund was never processed and I called American Express today after paying off my balance as I do not trust working with them. They weren't aware about the refund and told me they are going to review their records : reference number they gave me is XXXX
